instructions: Test your knowledge of database schema definition.

questions.question: Which command is used to add a new column to an existing table?
What is the difference between DROP and TRUNCATE?
options: DROP removes data, TRUNCATE removes structure
DROP removes structure and data, TRUNCATE removes only data
